positive: A delicate, scientific-style botanical illustration of various exotic ferns and medicinal herbs. The drawing must be executed as detailed black ink engraving on aged parchment paper. Include small, elegant Latin labels and cross-section diagrams, emphasizing natural symmetry and precision. Minimalist, academic, and highly detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
